description: [DSRs: crates/dspy-rs/src/rlm/exec.rs] Implement Jupyter-style output semantics: execute statements, eval last expression unless suppressed by ';', combine stdout + repr, apply truncation.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan (Phase 4): Jupyter-style output semantics inside `TypedRlm::call`.
- Execute all statements; if last statement is expression (no trailing `;`), evaluate and append repr.
- Combine stdout first, then repr of last expression.
- If empty: show "(no output - did you forget to print?)".
- Truncate at `max_output_chars`, then later history truncation uses DSPy marker at `max_history_output_chars`.

title: Task 4.4: Implement Jupyter-style output semantics
